name: Savory Chicken with Pine Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the chicken and place it in a bowl with the marinade ingredients.
2. Blanch the bamboo shoots in boiling water for 30 seconds to remove any tinny, canned flavor.
3. In a small bowl, mix all the sauce ingredients.
4. Heat a wok, add 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, and stir-fry pine nuts until golden brown. Set aside on paper towel.
5. Using the same wok, heat again and add another 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil.
6. On high heat, add garlic and stir-fry for 10 seconds.
7. Add the chicken with marinade to the wok and stir-fry until it is white but not completely cooked through.
8. Add the sauce mixture and bamboo shoots to the wok, cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
9. Stir in the pine nuts and green onions, mix well, and serve.
